# Amalfi Coast Travel

> Independent travel guide for the Amalfi Coast, Sorrento Peninsula, and Gulf Islands (Capri, Ischia, Procida). Covers destinations, beaches, itineraries, practical transport, and seasonal events. Available in 6 languages: English (en-us, en-gb), Italian (it-it), French (fr-fr), German (de-de), Spanish (es-es).

## Destinations — Amalfi Coast

- [Amalfi](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/amalfi-coast/amalfi/): Cathedral of Sant'Andrea, Piazza Duomo, paper mills, Arab-Norman history
- [Positano](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/amalfi-coast/positano/): Iconic cliffside village, Spiaggia Grande, ceramic staircases, ferry connections
- [Praiano](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/amalfi-coast/praiano/): Quieter alternative to Positano, Fiordo di Furore nearby, local life
- [Ravello](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/amalfi-coast/ravello/): Hilltop town, Villa Rufolo, Villa Cimbrone, Ravello Festival (classical music)
- [Maiori](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/amalfi-coast/maiori/): Longest beach on the coast, laid-back, fewer tourists
- [Minori](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/amalfi-coast/minori/): Roman villa ruins, limoncello production, local pastry scene

## Destinations — Sorrento Peninsula

- [Sorrento](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/sorrento-peninsula/sorrento/): Main gateway town, ferry hub, limoncello, Piazza Tasso
- [Sant'Agnello](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/sorrento-peninsula/sant-agnello/): Residential neighbor of Sorrento, quieter base, sea views
- [Massa Lubrense](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/sorrento-peninsula/massa-lubrense/): Tip of the peninsula, Punta Campanella, hiking, views of Capri
- [Vico Equense](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/sorrento-peninsula/vico-equense/): Medieval cliff town, pizza by the metre, Aequa ruins

## Destinations — Gulf Islands

- [Capri](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/isole/capri/): Blue Grotto, Via Krupp, Monte Solaro, luxury boutiques, day-trip logistics
- [Ischia](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/isole/ischia/): Volcanic island, thermal spas, Aragonese Castle, Maronti beach, 5 communes
- [Procida](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/isole/procida/): Smallest Gulf island, pastel-colored Marina Corricella, Il Postino filming location, 2022 Italian Capital of Culture

## Beaches — Amalfi Coast

- [Fiordo di Furore](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/beaches/amalfi-coast/fiordo-di-furore/): Dramatic fjord-like gorge beach, no sun until afternoon, access by steep stairs or boat
- [Spiaggia Grande Positano](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/beaches/amalfi-coast/spiaggia-grande-positano/): Main beach of Positano, pebble/sand mix, paid sun-beds, ferry landing point
- [Santa Croce Amalfi](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/beaches/amalfi-coast/santa-croce-amalfi/): Hidden cove near Amalfi accessible only by boat or free shuttle, crystal-clear water

## Beaches — Sorrento Peninsula

- [Regina Giovanna](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/beaches/sorrentine-peninsula/regina-giovanna/): Natural pool inside Roman ruins, rocky access, free, EAV bus from Sorrento
- [Marina del Cantone](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/beaches/sorrentine-peninsula/marina-del-cantone/): Pebble beach at end of Nerano valley, excellent seafood (Spaghetti alla Nerano), snorkeling
- [Cala di Mitigliano](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/beaches/sorrentine-peninsula/cala-mitigliano/): Steep trail descent, best view of Capri from a beach, pristine water, no services

## Beaches — Gulf Islands

- [Marina Piccola Capri](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/beaches/islands/marina-piccola-capri/): Capri's main swimming area, La Canzone del Mare historic lido, shade by afternoon
- [Spiaggia dei Maronti](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/beaches/islands/spiaggia-maronti/): Ischia's longest beach (3 km), volcanic black sand, natural fumaroles (steam vents), taxi-boat from Sant'Angelo
- [Cala del Pozzo Vecchio](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/beaches/islands/cala-del-pozzo-vecchio/): Procida beach from the film Il Postino (1994), volcanic black sand, authentic and uncrowded

## Itineraries

- [1-day: Amalfi Coast from Naples](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/itineraries/1-day/amalfi-coast-from-naples/): Day-trip by ferry or SITA bus, Positano–Amalfi–Ravello loop
- [1-day: Capri from Sorrento](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/itineraries/1-day/capri-from-sorrento/): Early ferry, Blue Grotto, Monte Solaro, return by afternoon
- [1-day: Path of the Gods Trek](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/itineraries/1-day/path-of-the-gods-trek/): Agerola to Nocelle, 7.5 km coastal trail, bus connections
- [3-day: Classic Amalfi Coast](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/itineraries/3-days/classic-amalfi-coast/): Positano, Amalfi, Ravello, day-trip to Capri
- [3-day: Sorrento, Pompeii & History](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/itineraries/3-days/sorrento-pompeii-history/): Sorrento base, Pompeii, Herculaneum, Vesuvius
- [3-day: Islands — Ischia & Procida](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/itineraries/3-days/islands-ischia-procida/): Thermal baths on Ischia, authentic Procida, island-hopping logistics
- [7-day: Grand Tour Coast & Peninsula](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/itineraries/7-days/grand-tour-coast-peninsula/): Full coast from Sorrento to Salerno, all main towns, Capri, Pompeii
- [7-day: Slow Travel Villages & Food](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/itineraries/7-days/slow-travel-villages-food/): Lesser-known villages, local markets, food producers, no crowds

## Practical Guides

- [Ferries & Hydrofoils](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/guide/ferries/): Timetables, ports (Naples Beverello, Molo Angioino, Mergellina), operators (Caremar, SNAV, Alilauro, NLG)
- [SITA Bus](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/guide/sita-bus/): SS163 coastal road bus service, ticket purchasing, crowding tips, scenic stops
- [Parking & ZTL](https://amalficoast-travel.com/en-us/guide/parking-ztl/): Restricted traffic zones (ZTL) on the Amalfi Coast, paid parking options, car-free strategy

## Events (Italian locale — full coverage)

- [Festa di Sant'Andrea Amalfi](https://amalficoast-travel.com/it-it/eventi/costiera-amalfitana/festa-sant-andrea-amalfi/): 27 June & 30 November, patron saint procession and fireworks
- [Ravello Festival](https://amalficoast-travel.com/it-it/eventi/costiera-amalfitana/ravello-festival/): July–September, world-class classical concerts on the Villa Rufolo terrace
- [Fuochi di Ferragosto](https://amalficoast-travel.com/it-it/eventi/costiera-amalfitana/fuochi-ferragosto-positano-maiori/): 14–15 August fireworks over Positano and Maiori
- [Ischia Global Film Festival](https://amalficoast-travel.com/it-it/eventi/isole/ischia-global-film-festival/): July, international cinema on the island

## Languages

Each section is fully translated. Use the locale prefix to access content in the desired language:

- `/en-us/` — American English
- `/en-gb/` — British English
- `/it-it/` — Italian (most complete, includes events section)
- `/fr-fr/` — French (plages, itinéraires, destinations)
- `/de-de/` — German (Strände, Reiserouten, Destinationen)
- `/es-es/` — Spanish (playas, itinerarios, destinos)
